name: Western Union
description_short: Western Sun Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution serving Oklahoma communities with auto loans, savings accounts, certificates, and personalized financial services.
description_long:
Western Sun Federal Credit Union (WSFCU) is a not-for-profit, member-owned credit union headquartered in Broken Arrow, Oklahoma, with multiple branch locations across the Tulsa area including Bixby and Downtown Tulsa. The institution operates under NCUA insurance and focuses on serving its community through competitive rates and personalized member service. WSFCU's mission emphasizes friendly, professional service and electronic financial accessibility for its membership base.

The credit union offers a comprehensive range of financial products including auto loans (as low as 5.49% APR for new vehicles), boat loans (7.64% APR), certificates of deposit (up to 3.46% APY), money market accounts (1.20% APY), checking accounts with cash back rewards (Kasasa Cash Back Checking offering 3% cash back on debit purchases up to $400 per cycle), savings accounts, and mortgage loans. They provide online banking, loan applications, and a free auto-buying resource tool for members shopping for vehicles.

WFSCU distinguishes itself through member-focused initiatives including community events (annual car shows, shred days, electronics recycling), financial education content covering topics like debt consolidation and credit scores, and direct member testimonials highlighting credit improvement assistance. The credit union maintains multiple physical branch locations with extended drive-up hours (7:30am-5:30pm weekdays) and Saturday service, on-site ATMs, and accessible customer support via phone and fax.

As a credit union, WSFCU serves a defined membership rather than the general public, which may require membership eligibility criteria. While specific membership requirements are not detailed on the website, the competitive rates and member-centric services position this as a legitimate community credit union option. The website emphasizes transparency with rate disclosures and member protections, though detailed fee schedules and full account terms are referenced but not fully displayed in the captured content.
pros: Auto loan rates as low as 5.49% APR for new vehicles with online and in-person application options
Kasasa Cash Back Checking account offering 3% cash back on debit card purchases (up to $400 per cycle)
Certificate of deposit rates up to 3.46% APY
Extended branch hours including Saturday service (9am-12pm) and early drive-up access (7:30am weekdays)
Multiple physical locations in Broken Arrow, Bixby, and Downtown Tulsa with on-site ATMs
Free auto-buying resource tool to help members search local new and pre-owned vehicles
Community engagement programs including financial education, shred days, car shows, and donation initiatives
cons: Membership requirements likely restrict access to only eligible members (specific criteria not disclosed on website)
Limited information available about personal loan products, credit cards, or other consumer credit options beyond auto and boat loans
Money market account rates relatively low at 1.20% APY compared to online-only alternatives
Website does not clearly disclose account fees, minimum balance requirements, or full terms and conditions
No mention of mobile app availability or mobile banking capabilities despite emphasis on electronic services
best_for: Oklahoma residents (particularly in Tulsa area) seeking competitive auto financing with personalized service
Credit union members looking to rebuild credit with supportive financial guidance and accessible loan products
Vehicle buyers who want free pre-shopping research tools and competitive rates on auto loans
Community-minded savers wanting certificates of deposit and savings accounts from a local, member-owned institution
diagnosis: Western Sun Federal Credit Union is best for Oklahoma residents (especially Tulsa area) who qualify for membership and seek competitive auto loans, savings products, and personalized service from a community-focused credit union. The main caveat is that membership eligibility requirements apply, and the credit union's product offerings appear concentrated on auto financing and basic savings rather than comprehensive personal lending or credit products.
services: Auto loans for new vehicles (5.49% APR)
Kasasa Cash Back Checking accounts (3% cash back rewards)
Online banking and electronic account access
Free auto-buying resource and vehicle search tool
Branch and ATM access at multiple locations
Financial education resources and member support
meta_title: Western Sun — Credit Union in Broken Arrow, OK | CreditDoc
meta_description: Western Sun — NCUA-insured credit union in Broken Arrow, OK. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
